summary: Identified the unequal order distribution issue between groups -1002962669521 and -1003401719366. Started implementing a solution to treat all groups in order_groups table equally instead of having main vs additional groups, but the code replacement encountered formatting issues that need to be resolved.
current_status: The system has unequal order distribution where one group receives orders from another but not vice versa. A fix is in progress to make all order groups receive orders equally with proper global deduplication, but implementation needs completion due to code replacement errors.
